Related Entities

  • hospital HIGHPOINT HEALTH-SUMNER WITH ASCENSION SAINT THOMA 2-star overall rating
  • hospital TRISTAR HENDERSONVILLE MEDICAL CENTER 4-star overall rating
  • snf THE WATERS OF GALLATIN, LLC 3-star, 124 beds
  • snf GALLATIN CENTER FOR REHABILITATION AND HEALING 4-star, 207 beds
  • snf NHC HEALTHCARE, HENDERSONVILLE 2-star, 122 beds
  • snf SIGNATURE HEALTH OF PORTLAND REHAB & WELLNESS CENT 1-star, 112 beds
  • snf WESTMORELAND CARE & REHAB CTR 4-star, 100 beds
  • snf NHC PLACE SUMNER 5-star, 92 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
